S.FORM: Bruce Altman htgan na ryax 1955 kawas 7 byacing 3 ryax. tmasot mqbaq biru beh Yale School of Drama. qyanux na sraral 1972 kawas htgan na ryax maki The Bronx, New York. Bruce Altman maki yotay squilq puqing ramu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ő≤ru ¶~ ®e altman ńßt…£an na rjax **** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * rjax. tmas~…ēot mqő≤aq ő≤iru ő≤eńß jale s~…ē ¶~ ®ńßool o* *rama. qjanux na s~…ēraral **** kawas~…ē ńßt…£an na rjax maki tńße ő≤ronx, new jork. ő≤ru ¶~ ®e altman maki jotaj s~…ēquilq puqiŇč ramu. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
